# QRCode.js local distribution

- Package: qrcodejs 1.0.0 (Kazuhiko Arase)
- License: MIT
- Upstream: <https://github.com/davidshimjs/qrcodejs>
- Downloaded only at build time and bundled locally under
  `media/com_memipilates/js/vendor`; the browser never calls a third-party QR
  service.
- SHA-256: C541EF06327885A8415BCA8DF6071E14189B4855336DEF4F36DB54BDE8484F36

The asset is used solely to render a client’s already-authorised opaque QR
token. No name, email address, payment data or other personal details are
encoded in the QR image.
